improvement_hint: Hoist 白川郷 / 五箇山 canonical 合掌造り cluster directly; current top items are unrelated Gifu Important Cultural Property entries and the actual 白川郷 entity is buried.
Add canonical_budget_hostels / guesthouses block for backpacker queries; current response returns expensive 秘湯 ryokan and ANA hotels that don't match the under-5000-yen youth hostel constraint.
Top result has wrong municipality (多摩市 / 町田市 / 八王子市 for a 三鷹 spot); fix municipality assignment and surface advance-ticket booking note canonically.
Solid response with both Wikidata canonical 鳥取砂丘 entity and BUNKA designation; could add 砂の美術館 + 砂丘らっきょう pairing as 'top sub-spots' block.
Excellent: canonical_tohoku_hisoyu_ryokan block hoists Nyutō onsen-go (Tsuru-no-yu / Tae-no-yu) + 日本秘湯を守る会 hito_yu_kai Akita members exactly match the 秘湯 query. RULE E boost.

ジブリパーク is the headline Aichi Ghibli answer but is buried as result #1 with weak description; canonical_anime_pilgrimage block lacks Ghibli entries entirely. Add Ghibli sub-cluster (ジブリパーク / 愛・地球博記念公園 / もののけの里 etc).
canonical_accessible_destinations correctly hoists 姫路城 with official accessibility URL + wheelchair-loan note. Results items are noisy ('くらし・手続きトップ') — improve municipal-scrape naming.

canonical_family_friendly Fukuoka entries are excellent (海の中道 / マリンワールド / 福岡市動物園) but spots=0 and preservation_districts_kyushu_fanout is off-topic noise for a theme-park query — suppress fanout when family canonical fires.

Query is multi-prefecture rail-route (Fukuoka↔Beppu↔Nagasaki) but response is Fukuoka-only hub list with no inter-prefecture rail-routing or 北九州レールパス coverage. Add canonical_jr_pass_routes block for pass queries.
canonical_festivals 阿波踊り entry with Aug 12-15 dates + 'niwakaren visitor-participation welcome' note directly answers the participation question. Solid.

canonical_premium_brand_meat hoists 宮崎牛 + 宮崎地頭鶏; MAFF GI items confirm 宮崎牛 registered. Minor: 宮崎地頭鶏 designation label 'Important Folk Cultural Property' is questionable — it's a heritage chicken breed not folk arts.
Excellent get_entity_full for Q5854: UNESCO WHS confirmed, Three Views of Japan, 593 CE founding, free price band. Could fill opening_hours + tide schedule for the floating-torii view.

Query is about Fushimi sake brewing but items are entirely 桜の穴場 + 西京パン articles, not sake-specific. The Fushimi 三大酒どころ + UNESCO 2024 traditional sake brewing designation is mentioned only incidentally inside body_paragraphs. Add canonical sake-brewing block.
canonical_iconic_landmarks hoists 角島大橋 first with QID + detailed note; municipal_scrape spot #3 has the actual 角島大橋 page. RULE E boost. Many noisy entries with same generic name 'おいでませ山口へ'.

白神山地 + 白神岳 wikidata + akita-shirakami DMO is on-target, but DMO pages dominate with repeated identical descriptions and Kumamoto / 両白山地 (Toyama) results pollute. Improve dedup and surface specific 暗門の滝 / 十二湖 hiking sub-spots.
canonical_iconic_landmarks hoists 黒部峡谷 + 黒部ダム + 立山雪の大谷 + アルペンルート + 雨晴海岸 — perfectly answers Toyama-Kurobe family-scenic intent. spots=0 is fine because canonical covers it. RULE E boost.

Query is for hidden waterfalls / gorges in Miyazaki but response surfaces canonical iconic 高千穂峡 + 青島 etc — flagship items not 'hidden'. Add canonical_hidden_falls block (関之尾滝 / 矢研の滝 / 真名井の滝-other / 祝子川渓谷) and apply hidden_gem polarity.
奈良公園 itself is missing from canonical_iconic_landmarks (only 東大寺 / 春日大社 / 法隆寺 surfaced) and spots=0. Add 奈良公園 entity + 鹿せんべい custom +若草山 family-trip notes.
青山剛昌ふるさと館 + DMO 山陰インバウンド plan + 北栄町 観光交流課 perfectly identify Hokuei (Aoyama's hometown). canonical_anime_pilgrimage list lacks Conan entry — add 名探偵コナン / 北栄町 to canonical block. Rule E partial.

Fukuoka vegetarian/Muslim guide page (top result, crossroadfukuoka.jp) is the correct answer for Fukuoka halal; but canonical_halal_food_destinations lists Tokyo/Kyoto/Osaka/Hokkaido and ZERO Kyushu entries — add Fukuoka mosque + halal-certified motsunabe / ramen anchors.

日光東照宮 is in results but canonical_accessible_destinations lists 7 sites and Nikko is NOT among them — add Nikko Toshogu accessibility entry with official accessibility URL. Language constraint: de requested, content all en/ja.
山寺 BUNKA-293 + Japan Heritage #056 '山寺が支えた紅花文化' both surfaced for Yamagata. Adequate; could hoist 立石寺 (Risshaku-ji) Wikidata QID and Basho haiku connection.

canonical_iconic_landmarks correctly hoists 熊本城 with 'special viewing path' stroller-accessible note and 阿蘇山; but spots=0 and Kyushu preservation-district fanout (16 items) pollutes a family/castle query. Add canonical_family_friendly Kumamoto block (城彩苑 / 阿蘇カドリードミニオン / 桜の馬場).
Excellent: canonical_iconic_landmarks 高千穂峡 + 天岩戸神社 + Wikidata Q2027215 + 高千穂峡貸しボート (municipal_scrape) + 高千穂神楽 all surface. RULE E boost.
5 onsen_ryokan in 下呂温泉 area with phone / website / coordinates; 朝日荘 has 日本秘湯を守る会 designation. Add explanatory note about 下呂温泉 being one of 日本三名泉 + alkaline-simple-spring water character.
